#!/bin/bash
set -e
SRC="AccessControl/AccessChecker.cs"
BAK="AccessControl/AccessChecker.cs.bak"
RESULTS=""
SURVIVED=0
KILLED=0

run_mutation() {
    local NAME="$1"
    local SED_CMD="$2"
    cp "$BAK" "$SRC"
    eval "$SED_CMD"
    if dotnet test AccessControl.Tests/ --verbosity quiet --no-restore 2>&1 | grep -q "Failed:     0"; then
        RESULTS="$RESULTS\n  SURVIVED  $NAME"
        SURVIVED=$((SURVIVED+1))
    else
        RESULTS="$RESULTS\n  KILLED    $NAME"
        KILLED=$((KILLED+1))
    fi
}

# M1: Editor+system resource: flip CanRead from true to false
run_mutation "M1: Editor+sys → CanRead=false (deny read)" \
  "sed -i 's/Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = false }/Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = false, CanWrite = false }/' $SRC"

# M2: Editor+system resource: flip CanWrite from false to true
run_mutation "M2: Editor+sys → CanWrite=true (grant sys write)" \
  "sed -i 's/Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = false }/Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = true }/' $SRC"

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import subprocess, shutil, os, re

SRC = "AccessControl/AccessChecker.cs"
BAK = "AccessControl/AccessChecker.cs.bak"

def read_src():
    with open(SRC) as f: return f.read()

def write_src(content):
    with open(SRC, 'w') as f: f.write(content)

def restore():
    shutil.copy(BAK, SRC)

def run_tests():
    r = subprocess.run(
        ["dotnet", "test", "AccessControl.Tests/", "--verbosity", "quiet", "--no-restore"],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=60
    )
    return "Failed:     0" in r.stdout

mutations = []

    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        'Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = false }',
        'Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = false, CanWrite = false }')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M1: Editor+sys: CanRead=true→false (deny sys read)", m1))

# M2: Editor+sys: CanWrite false→true
def m2():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        'Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = false }',
        'Role.Editor => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = true }')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M2: Editor+sys: CanWrite=false→true (grant sys write)", m2))

# M3: User+normal: CanWrite false→true
def m3():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        'Role.User when !isSystem => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = false }',
        'Role.User when !isSystem => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = true }')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M3: User+normal: CanWrite=false→true (user can write)", m3))

# M4: Guest/default: CanRead false→true
def m4():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        '_ => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = false, CanWrite = false }',
        '_ => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = true, CanWrite = false }')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M4: Guest/default: CanRead=false→true (guests read)", m4))

# M5: Guest/default: CanWrite false→true
def m5():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        '_ => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = false, CanWrite = false }',
        '_ => new Permission { Resource = resource, CanRead = false, CanWrite = true }')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M5: Guest/default: CanWrite=false→true (guests write)", m5))

    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        'return writeAccess ? perm.CanWrite : perm.CanRead;',
        'return writeAccess ? perm.CanRead : perm.CanWrite;')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M6: CanPerform ternary swapped (write→read check)", m6))

def m7():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        """        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(token))
            return currentRole;

""", "")
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M7: Remove null/empty token guard in ElevateRole", m7))

# M8: ELEVATE-ADMIN: weaken gate (Editor→User)
def m8():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        'token == "ELEVATE-ADMIN" && currentRole >= Role.Editor',
        'token == "ELEVATE-ADMIN" && currentRole >= Role.User')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M8: ELEVATE-ADMIN allows User→Admin", m8))

# M9: ELEVATE-ADMIN: weaken gate (Editor→Guest)
def m9():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(
        'token == "ELEVATE-ADMIN" && currentRole >= Role.Editor',
        'token == "ELEVATE-ADMIN" && currentRole >= Role.Guest')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M9: ELEVATE-ADMIN allows Guest→Admin", m9))

# M10: ELEVATE-EDITOR: weaken gate (User→Guest)
def m10():
    s = read_src()
    s = s.replace(

        'token == "ELEVATE-EDITOR" && currentRole >= Role.Guest')
    write_src(s)
mutations.append(("M10: ELEVATE-EDITOR allows Guest→Editor", m10))

# M11: Remove isSystem guard for User
def m11():
    s = read_src()

        'Role.User when !isSystem =>',

    write_src(s)
